[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101110000 5
1 0000101001 3
2 1101011110 7
3 0011011010 5
4 0111010100 5
5 1101110000 5
6 0000101001 3
7 0000000100 1

70 07 0000011010 3
